key_suppliers: Chongqing Zhifei Biological Products Co., Ltd.
dependencies: Most principal materials used in manufacturing operations are available from more than one source
Certain raw or intermediate materials obtained primarily from only one source
Reliance on third-party relationships and outsourcing arrangements for key aspects of business including development, manufacture and commercialization

risks: Dependence on single-source suppliers for certain components
Potential risk associated with raw materials, components and supplies from single sources
Concentration risk with single distributor in China for vaccine sales
Failure of third parties to meet contractual, regulatory and other obligations
Disruption of relationships with third parties could materially adversely affect business
Limited access to and supply of biological materials including tissue samples, cell lines, pathogens, bacteria, viral strains

Regulatory approval delays affecting supply chain planning
Disruptions to supply chain from climate change impacts
Manufacturing delays causing supply constraints in international markets for ProQuad and Varivax
